items.description: An ancient Pokémon fossil. It looks like a hard, sturdy skill

items.name: Jaw Fossil
items.description: An ancient Pokémon fossil. It looks like a large jaw

items.description: An ancient Pokémon fossil. It looks like a thin sail from a Pokémon's body

items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's head. Its jagged fangs look just likea saw

items.name: Wing Fossil (right wing)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's right wing. Its finger bones have become part of the wing

items.name: Wing Fossil (left wing)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's left wing. By joining its bones together, you can tell the size of the wing

items.name: Wing fossil (body)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. A hump juts out from the middle of its rickety spine

items.name: Wing Fossil (tail)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. Long and slend, it looks like it could bend gracefully

items.name: Headbutt Fossil (head)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's head. Its skull is dense and bulbous

items.name: Headbutt Fossil (body)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. Its torso is big, but its arms are quite small

items.name: Headbutt Fossil (tail)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. Its base is thick and sturdy

items.name: Shield Fossil (Head)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's head. Its sturdy, like a giant shield

items.name: Shield Fossil (body)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. Its thick bones supported a heavy head.

items.name: Shield Fossil (tail)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. Its hind hooves are particularly large.

items.name: Despot Fossil (head)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's headf. Its large fangs are as sharp as knives

items.name: Despot Fossil (body)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. Its sharp claws look like they could slice through anything

items.name: Despot Fossil (legs)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's legs. Two stocky legs support the rest of its body.

items.name: Despot Fossil (tail)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. Even the very tip is spiky like its frill

items.name: Tundra Fossil (head)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's head. It has sails that resemble an aurora

items.name: Tundra Fossil (body)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's body. It must have been pretty tall with a spin like this

items.name: Tundra Fossil (tail)
items.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon's tail. The tip is curled up and looks like a spring
